> import requests, sys
> hosts = [
>     'piped.video',
>     'piped.mha.fi',
>     'piped.syncpundit.com',
>     'piped.adminforge.de'
> ]
> vid = 'ZCbvyPbhRfA'
> for host in hosts:
>     try:
>         r = requests.get(f'https://{host}/api/v1/streams/{vid}', timeout=15)
>         if r.status_code != 200:
>             continue
>         j = r.json()
>         ms = j.get('muxedStreams') or []
>         if not ms:
>             # Fallback to videoStreams with proxyUrl
>             vs = j.get('videoStreams') or []
>             as_ = j.get('audioStreams') or []
>             # Prefer any mp4 in muxedStreams; if not available, skip
>         if ms:
>             cand = []
>             for v in ms:
>                 container = v.get('container')
>                 codec = (v.get('codec') or '').lower()
>                 if container == 'mp4' or 'avc' in codec or 'h264' in codec:
>                     cand.append(v)
>             if not cand:
>                 cand = ms
>             def score(v):
>                 q = v.get('quality') or ''
>                 num = 0
>                 try:
>                     num = int(''.join([c for c in q if c.isdigit()]))
>                 except Exception:
>                     pass
>                 br = v.get('bitrate') or 0
>                 return (num, br)
>             cand.sort(key=score, reverse=True)
>             url = cand[0].get('url') or cand[0].get('proxyUrl')
>             if url:
>                 print(url)
>                 sys.exit(0)
>     except Exception:
>         continue
> sys.exit(1)
> PY
